overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character traverses wet sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes through dense urban canyons filled with holographic advertisements, towering glass buildings, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with palm trees and corporate towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, following the street lined with palm trees and glass buildings

entered.detail: modern glass facade building with teal-tinted windows running along the left side of the sidewalk
tall palm trees planted along the street median in concrete planters
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated NCART signage near the top
large commercial building covered with bright pink and white digital advertisements
metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night in a futuristic metropolis. The camera follows a character walking past a modern glass office building on the left, with palm trees and street railings lining the right side. In the distance, the illuminated NCART tower rises above the neon-lit commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and digital advertising

events.description: approaching the pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection
stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the crosswalk to cross the wide intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the same direction toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical digital display showing advertisements near the crosswalk
large illuminated sign reading STUDIOS mounted on a building corner
wide street intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection, leaving the covered sidewalk behind. The NCART tower looms closer as the character enters a wide crosswalk. Digital advertising pillars and a large neon STUDIOS sign dominate the street corners, while other pedestrians walk ahead toward the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past on the street to the right
passing under the elevated highway overpass into a more enclosed space

agents.ego_description: finishing crossing the street and turning left to walk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street passing by the crosswalk

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
futuristic yellow taxi cab with illuminated headlights driving on the road
gray concrete retaining wall with yellow graffiti tags
curved on-ramp structure leading up to the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The character completes crossing the intersection as a yellow taxi passes by on the right. The environment transitions to a semi-covered underpass beneath an elevated highway, with graffiti-covered concrete walls replacing the open street. The lighting becomes darker and more mixed as the character moves under the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with holographic advertisements and retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in a white shirt through the neon-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and jeans walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running along the left side of the sidewalk with horizontal lines
large floating digital advertisements including a prominent red PASSION billboard
massive vertical digital display showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the character walks along a sidewalk bordered by a high concrete retaining wall on the left. The right side is dominated by massive holographic billboards and digital screens illuminating the night. A pedestrian in a white shirt walks ahead as the character proceeds through this dense commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon with dense neon signage and commercial towers

agents.ego_description: continuing down the bustling commercial street surrounded by towering advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and standing along the busy commercial street

entered.detail: narrow street flanked by extremely tall buildings covered in digital billboards creating a canyon effect
line of futuristic vehicles parked along the right side of the street
metal railings and bollards separating the pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the heart of the commercial district, where the street becomes a deep urban canyon of neon and holographic advertisements. Parked cars line the right side behind traffic barriers, while pedestrians populate the busy sidewalk. Towering glass buildings on both sides are completely covered in massive digital screens creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit metropolis, transitioning from an open commercial sidewalk into a dense, immersive urban canyon. It begins by following a character past a glass office building and palm trees, moving toward the illuminated NCART tower that looms in the distance. As the character enters a wide crosswalk at a major intersection, the open sidewalk gives way to digital advertising pillars and a large neon STUDIOS sign before the path shifts into a darker, graffiti-covered underpass beneath an elevated highway. The scene then emerges from the concrete shadows into a corridor bordered by a high retaining wall and massive holographic billboards that bathe the street in artificial light. Finally, the camera pushes into the heart of the commercial district, where the environment transforms into a deep canyon of towering glass buildings completely enveloped in digital screens and holographic advertisements.
